metrics.name: Daily P&L
metrics.query: SELECT SUM(pnl_realized) FROM trade_history WHERE date=TODAY

metrics.name: Win Rate
metrics.query: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN pnl_realized > 0 THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*) FROM trade_history WHERE date=TODAY

metrics.name: Open Positions
metrics.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM positions WHERE status='OPEN'

metrics.name: Average Trade Return
metrics.query: SELECT AVG(pnl_pct) FROM trade_history WHERE date=TODAY

metrics.name: Max Drawdown
metrics.query: SELECT MIN(cumulative_pnl) FROM performance_metrics WHERE date=TODAY

metrics.name: Proposal Response Time
metrics.query: SELECT AVG(approval_time_ms) FROM trade_requests WHERE date=TODAY
